name: Raj Judge
role: Executive Vice President of Corporate Strategy
bio: Raj Judge was appointed Executive Vice President of Corporate Strategy and a director, effective May 20, 2025. His FY2025 SCT figures cover only the partial-year period from his appointment through fiscal year-end on July 31, 2025; the bulk of the total is a June 3, 2025 equity grant of RSUs and PSUs that vest over four years.

badges.detail: Appointed EVP Corporate Strategy and Director May 20, 2025; FY25 covers ~2 months.

footnotes: Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2025 performance condition (grant-date fair value). Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion would be $3,550,981.
Salary, Non-Equity Incentive payout, and disclosed compensation generally reflect the partial-year period from his May 20, 2025 appointment through fiscal year-end.
